summary: Follow-up to MPI-189: revert Pod LTX transformer GGUF->bf16. cu130 killed the ~5min cold tax that was GGUFs only reason to exist (MPI-168). bf16 = better quality + kills the MPI-185 dequant OOM + unwinds the engine-split. GATED on MPI-189 shipping + a cu130 Pod confirming bf16 faults ~11s and fits 32GB through both stages. Closes MPI-185 when confirmed.
